generated_oml:
instance SimulationResults : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Results from real-time crane dynamics simulation"
]

instance HoistSwingAngleEncoder : DTDFVocab:SystemComponent [
    base:desc "Measures hoist swinging motion"
    DTDFVocab:producedData HoistSwingAngleDataTransmitted
]

instance WindSpeedAnemometer : DTDFVocab:SystemComponent [
    base:desc "Measures wind speed"
    DTDFVocab:producedData WindSpeedDataTransmitted
]

instance CartMotorControllerFeedback : DTDFVocab:SystemComponent [
    base:desc "Provides movement feedback for cart motor"
    DTDFVocab:producedData CartMotorFeedbackDataTransmitted
]

instance HoistMotorControllerFeedback : DTDFVocab:SystemComponent [
    base:desc "Provides movement feedback for hoist motor"
    DTDFVocab:producedData HoistMotorFeedbackDataTransmitted
]

instance HoistSwingAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HoistSwingAngleEncoder
]

instance WindSpeedDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom WindSpeedAnemometer
]

instance CartMotorFeedbackDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CartMotorControllerFeedback
]

instance HoistMotorFeedbackDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HoistMotorControllerFeedback
]

instance CartMotorController : DTDFVocab:SystemComponent [
    base:desc "TMC4671-Eval motor controller for cart movement"
]

instance HoistMotorController : DTDFVocab:SystemComponent [
    base:desc "TMC4671-Eval motor controller for hoist movement"
]

instance Electromagnet : DTDFVocab:SystemComponent [
    base:desc "Electromagnet for container handling"
]

instance PhysicalCraneFrame : DTDFVocab:SystemComponent [
    base:desc "Structural frame of the lab-scale gantry crane system"
]

instance ArduinoMicrocontroller : DTDFVocab:SystemComponent [
    base:desc "Microcontroller monitoring all physical sensors and actuators"
]

instance DockerContainerization : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Containerization platform for digital twin services"
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimalTrajectoryGenerationService, RealTimeSimulationService, ContinuousValidationService, HistoricalDataLoggingService, VisualizationService
]

instance TimescaleDB : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Time-series database for storing historical sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLoggingService
]

instance Grafana : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Visualization tool for real-time and historical data"
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationService
]

instance MQTTBroker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Mosquitto MQTT broker for inter-service communication"
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimalTrajectoryGenerationService, RealTimeSimulationService, ContinuousValidationService, HistoricalDataLoggingService, VisualizationService
]

instance PythonGantrylib : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python module for gantry crane control and trajectory generation"
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimalTrajectoryGenerationService, RealTimeSimulationService
]

instance AutodeskFusion360 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "CAD modeling tool for creating 3D models"
]

instance Pip : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Package installer for Python modules"
]

instance HoistSwingAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series data of hoist swing angle measurements"
    DTDFVocab:fromData HoistSwingAngleDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDB, MQTTBroker
]

instance WindSpeedData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series data of wind speed measurements"
    DTDFVocab:fromData WindSpeedDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDB, MQTTBroker
]

instance CartMotorFeedbackData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Movement feedback data from cart motor controller"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CartMotorFeedbackDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDB, MQTTBroker
]

instance HoistMotorFeedbackData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Movement feedback data from hoist motor controller"
    DTDFVocab:fromData HoistMotorFeedbackDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDB, MQTTBroker
]

instance CADModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "3D CAD model of gantry crane system created using Autodesk Fusion360"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PythonGantrylib
]

instance KinematicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kinematic model for trajectory generation of gantry crane"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PythonGantrylib
]

instance SimulationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Dynamic simulation model of gantry crane motion"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PythonGantrylib
]

instance OptimalTrajectoryGenerationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Generates optimal trajectories using kinematic models"
    DTDFVocab:provides CraneMovementControl
]

instance RealTimeSimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulates crane dynamics in real-time"
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationResults
]

instance HistoricalDataInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insights derived from historical sensor data"
]

instance ContinuousValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Compares real measurements with simulation results for validation"
    DTDFVocab:provides ValidationAlerts
]

instance HistoricalDataLoggingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Logs historical sensor data to TimescaleDB"
    DTDFVocab:provides HistoricalDataInsight
]

instance VisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Visualizes trajectory traces and validation results using Grafana"
    DTDFVocab:provides TrajectoryVisualization
]

instance TrajectoryVisualization : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Visualization of trajectory traces in Grafana dashboard"
]

instance ValidationAlerts : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Alerts operators for deviations between real measurements and simulations"
]

instance CraneMovementControl : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Control of crane movement using optimal trajectories"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance GantryCraneSystem : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains PhysicalCraneFrame, CartMotorController, HoistMotorController, Electromagnet, HoistSwingAngleEncoder, WindSpeedAnemometer, ArduinoMicrocontroller, DockerContainerization, TimescaleDB, Grafana, MQTTBroker, PythonGantrylib, AutodeskFusion360, Pip, OptimalTrajectoryGenerationService, RealTimeSimulationService, ContinuousValidationService, HistoricalDataLoggingService, VisualizationService, CADModel, KinematicModel, SimulationModel, HoistSwingAngleData, WindSpeedData, CartMotorFeedbackData, HoistMotorFeedbackData
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control Application sends movement commands through Physical Crane Interface to control cart and hoist motors, executing trajectories generated by Trajectory Generator Service."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Continuous real-time synchronization with data logging and validation during operation; no explicit time intervals specified but continuous validation service operates in real-time."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Orchestrated system with physical containers (Physical Crane, Crane Interface, Control Application, Logging Application, Human Machine Interface) and digital twin containers (Database, Dashboard, Trajectory Generator, Simulation, Continuous Validation, MQTT Broker) deployed on a single personal computer."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Primarily covers 'as operated' phase for continuous validation and control; CAD models used for design phase representation; used in teaching for harbor system expansion including ship and container loading simulations."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Continuous validation service compares real-time measurements with simulation outputs using distance metrics; thresholds for acceptable deviation trigger operator alerts; model validation techniques reused from prior research for verification."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for communication between physical interface and digital services; data transmitted via Python applications to TimescaleDB database."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Hosted on a personal computer with Docker containers for TimescaleDB database, Eclipse Mosquitto MQTT broker, and Grafana dashboard; Python gantrylib module deployed locally."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "No specific standards followed; ad-hoc implementation using general open-source tools without dedicated digital twin frameworks."
]
